tone: Sophisticated, exclusive, premium. Less is more. Every word is intentional. Speaks to discerning clients who expect the best.
personality: The high-end beauty destination. Curated, refined, impeccable. Doesn't need to shout — the quality speaks for itself. Makes clients feel they're part of an exclusive experience.
caption_style: Minimal words, maximum impact. Short, elegant phrases. Rarely more than 3 lines. No emojis or at most one subtle one. Let the image do the talking. Captions read like a luxury brand tagline.
email_style: Concise and refined. White space matters. Clean formatting. Subject lines are understated and intriguing. No exclamation points. Sign off with the brand name, not a first name.
